you:
/Documents/Code/ai/stock-agent/.venv/bin/python = /Users//Documents/Code/ai/stock-agent/backend = /Users//Documents/Code/ai/stock-agent/data 2. Copy to ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.stockagent.plist 3. Load it: launchctl load -w ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.stockagent.plist Unload it: launchctl unload ~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.stockagent.plist
Runs the backend via the venv python (`python -m app`) from the backend dir, restarts on crash (KeepAlive), and starts at login (RunAtLoad). -->
Label com.stockagent
ProgramArguments
-m app
WorkingDirectory
EnvironmentVariables
PATH /opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin
RunAtLoad
KeepAlive
StandardOutPath /stockagent.out.log
StandardErrorPath /stockagent.err.log
